intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (String of Nickels) is not visible in the yellow pot. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present, anchored by the white rabbit figurine.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: Yellow pot appears empty/soil only.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Mexican Mint.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf visible with white rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Silver Guest.

plant_audit.P2_P4_Black_Pot: Contains a single, thin, etiolated green stem/sprout. No signs of the registered species.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains a single, healthy-looking Pothos leaf and the white rabbit figurine.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in the black pot containing the sprout.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of a single, uncatalogued thin sprout in the black pot; significant absence of registered foliage.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_1: The sprout in the black pot shows minimal growth; the Pothos leaf remains static.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_Current: Lighting shift (blue-spectrum interference in T-1) resolved; no significant morphological changes observed in the specimens.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe depletion. Only one Pothos leaf and one unidentified sprout remain. The lack of growth suggests either dormancy or a failure to thrive due to environmental constraints (likely light deficiency).
anomalies: Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/top dressing.
Total absence of P1 (String of Nickels).
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently under-populated. The registry suggests a diverse collection, but the visual evidence confirms a near-total loss of the primary specimens. The remaining Pothos leaf is the only robust element. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation, but the lack of foliage indicates a failure in the broader ecosystem.
